**Субтитры:** Русские надписи, русские (софтсаб) | Multi-10

**Описание:**
Тока — обычный незаметный парень, которого все принимают за пустое место. Однажды его вместе с одноклассниками переносит в другой мир, но и там ничего не меняется! Все его товарищи получают сильные навыки, только Тока оказывается ни к чему не годным, и богиня Вишис ссылает его в древние развалины. Но там оказывается, что навыки Токи не такие уж никчёмные. Теперь он клянётся отомстить богине и раскрывает свой истинный характер.

**Language Options**
You can [download here](https://mega.nz/folder/kcQhWZCA#c4wfvx2RXI9XN8XeBso09g) two scripts that do the following (Windows/macOS-Linux):

- *Keep Japanese*: Throws out all audio tracks other than Japanese
- *Keep English*: Throws out all audio and subtitles tracks other than English

Put all the video files into the *Language Options* folder and run the corresponding script. The resulting files can be found in the *output* folder.

Note: [MKVToolNix](https://mkvtoolnix.download/downloads.html) must be installed on your system
***

title: [Brazh] Demon Slayer Henshū 03 - La maison aux tambours - 1080p.MULTI.x264
description:
# **Demon Slayer Henshū 03 - La maison aux tambours**
#
![](https://static.wikia.nocookie.net/fan-kai/images/5/54/Demon_slayer_henshu_affiche_03.png/revision/latest/scale-to-width-down/1000?cb=20240418144617&path-prefix=fr)


#
# **PRÉSENTATION**
**Demon Slayer Henshū** est une relecture de l'animé Demon Slayer qui se veut plus concise et plus conforme au manga original, et offrant un plus grand plaisir de visionnage. 
Les scènes HS sont coupées au maximum et certains passages sont remis dans le bon contexte afin d’obtenir une œuvre plus fidèle au manga.

Les sources utilisées pour le montage viennent de S3rnx pour la vidéo et l'audio en japonais, de T3kashi pour l'audio en français et les sous-titres, mais également de Tenrai-Sensei pour tous les kanjis qui ont été adaptés/traduits. Merci à eux ! 

Le torrent contient également le pack de métadonnées (fichiers .NFO + .PNG) pour que le rendu soit optimal avec nos productions sur Plex, Jellyfin... ([le tutoriel est disponible ici](https://fan-kai.fandom.com/fr/wiki/Plex)). Vous n'êtes pas obligés de le télécharger.

# **SYNOPSIS**
Dans le Japon de l'ère Taisho, le bienveillant Tanjiro Kamado gagne sa vie en vendant du charbon de bois. Mais sa vie paisible est brisée lorsqu'un démon massacre toute sa famille.
Sa petite sœur Nezuko est la seule survivante, mais elle a elle-même été transformée en démon ! Tanjiro se lance dans un voyage dangereux pour trouver un moyen de ramener sa sœur à la normale et de détruire le démon qui a ruiné sa vie.

# **COMMENTAIRES**
Ce premier film couvre les épisodes **11 à 14**, soit les chapitres **20 à 27** du manga.
[Vous trouverez ici toute la correspondance entre les épisodes et chapitres de Demon Slayer.](https://fan-kai.fandom.com/fr/wiki/Demon_Slayer_Hensh%C5%AB)

Pour plus d’informations, des news, réagir sur nos Kais, et pour regarder nos films en streaming, RDV sur [notre Discord !](https://discord.com/servers/team-fankai-414117314418704414 "discord link")

Nous réalisons également des versions Fan-Kai de nombreux autre anime, en VF et/ou VOST : Bleach, Black Clover, D.Gray-Man, Dragon Ball, Fairy Tail, Hunter x Hunter, My Hero Academia, Naruto, One Piece et bien d’autres à venir…

## **INFOS UPLOAD**

description:
チコちゃんに叱られる！　真夏の拡大版生放送スペシャル！大スター共演！
[総合] 
2024年08月30日 午後7:30 〜 午後8:42 (1時間12分)
真夏の拡大版生放送スペシャル！チコちゃんの素朴な疑問に答えるため生放送中にリアルタイムで実証実験！あの大スターも生中継で大規模実験に参加！？

![alt text](https://i.imgur.com/barakTZ.png "チコちゃんに叱られる！　真夏の拡大版生放送スペシャル！大スター共演！")

	今回のチコちゃんの素朴な疑問は…？生放送で見てのお楽しみ！この夏、世界中を熱狂させたオリンピック・スポーツにまつわる疑問や真夏にピッタリの涼しくなる疑問が続々と登場！スタジオゲストの加藤浩次さんやホラン千秋さんを納得させるため、郷ひろみさん、あばれる君、キムラ緑子さんが体当たりで謎解きの実証にチャレンジ！スタジオを飛び出した愛ちゃんに代わってキョエちゃんがまさかのＭＣに！？

title: [SubsPlus+] Oshi no Ko - S02E09v2 (DSNP WEB 1080p AVC EAC3)
description:
*Completely automated release so expect occasional problems - Report issues and suggest improvements here or on discord.*
*I am not affiliated with SubsPlease. This is a personal project that may stop at any time.*

| [MediaInfo](https://rentry.co/qf9racbf/raw) | Source            |
|-----------|-------------------|
| Video     | Disney+ (AVC) via Anonymous    |
| Audio     | Amazon Hidive Channel (EAC3) via Erai-raws    |
| Subtitles | Hidive (Modified) via Erai-raws |
| Chapters  | Automatic  |

> Fansub recommendation if you can wait: **Starsugen**

---

**Enhancements automatically applied:**
- Main dialogue restyled to Gandhi-Sans styling
- Timing post processor applied to patch up Hidive's terrible timing, snap to keyframe, etc.
- Readable subtitles - Overlapping lines no longer shift positions when you're trying to read them
- Signs have their proper fonts ripped
- Hidive's small font style for alternative speakers moved to top of screen
- Detection to add basic song styling
- Overlapping main dialogue given blue outline to differentiate speakers
- Fixed signs displaying on top of dialogue
- Faux em-dashes converted to real ones
- Proper stutter (W-what?! -> Wh-What?!, S-s-s-subsplus -> S-S-S-Subsplus)
- Detect OP & ED chapters using animethemes api

---

**Comment:**

> Amazon Hidive audio this week since Tsundere-Raws is currently unable to get Amazon Prime and I don't want to wait too much longer for ToonsHub rip. The difference is not that big any ways.

title: [washed] Giji Harem - S01E08 (WEB 1080p AVC AAC) | Pseudo Harem
description:
From washed:

---

Sorry for the delay, hectic week. Really wanted to get this out before the next episode came out, but sadly couldn’t.

On another note, I created a [Discord server](https://discord.gg/uZtsXkZfBJ) (eight episodes in lmao) just in case anyone wants progress updates or has general advice/complaints/encouragement for me. I realized I’ve been asking for tips/criticism the whole time but there are people without a Nyaa account who can’t comment. Plus, if there are any major delays like this one at least you’ll know what’s going on.

(Also join if you’re a skilled typesetter/QCer and you’re interested in working on this show! A proper group release is planned for the batch, but I have no plans to touch TS myself for weekly releases besides making signs readable unless something like episode 7 happens again.)

**TL:** Crunchyroll
**TLC/ED/TM/QC:** washed
[Here’s a list of changes](https://rentry.co/aupxnyoy) made from the official release (non-exhaustive).
And [here's a script comparison](https://www.diffchecker.com/U1R90YY5/) between the official subs and my subs for this episode. *(tips/criticism appreciated!)*

*This release only supports [mpv](https://mpv.io/). Using other players may result in playback issues, as they have not been tested.*

title: [SubsPlus+] I Parry Everything - S01E09 (AMZN WEB 1080p AVC EAC3) | Ore wa Subete wo Parry Suru
description:
*Completely automated release so expect occasional problems - Report issues and suggest improvements here or on discord.*
*I am not affiliated with SubsPlease. This is a personal project that may stop at any time.*

| [MediaInfo](https://rentry.co/4zmaso44/raw) | Source            |
|-----------|-------------------|
| Video     | Amazon Hidive Channel (AVC) via Erai-raws    |
| Audio     | Amazon Hidive Channel (EAC3) via Erai-raws    |
| Subtitles | Hidive (Modified) via Erai-raws |
| Chapters  | Automatic  |



---

**Enhancements automatically applied:**
- Main dialogue restyled to Gandhi-Sans styling
- Timing post processor applied to patch up Hidive's terrible timing, snap to keyframe, etc.
- Readable subtitles - Overlapping lines no longer shift positions when you're trying to read them
- Signs have their proper fonts ripped
- Hidive's small font style for alternative speakers moved to top of screen
- Detection to add basic song styling
- Overlapping main dialogue given blue outline to differentiate speakers
- Fixed signs displaying on top of dialogue
- Faux em-dashes converted to real ones
- Proper stutter (W-what?! -> Wh-What?!, S-s-s-subsplus -> S-S-S-Subsplus)
- Detect OP & ED chapters using animethemes api

title: [chasa] Pseudo Harem S01E09 (WEBDL 1080p AVC AAC) (Giji Harem)
description:
**It's official! Me, washed, and reza (and possibly ION) will be doing a batch together at the end of the series!**
No ETA for it, but if you want to be alerted on it's release, join the [Discord](https://discord.gg/jbVBTmUYbw)!
As by request, I will add the naming the anime does as an alternative track. This will be done for batch, and not weekly releases.

In other news, I'm going to start work on a full Komi Can't Communicate release, with proper typesetting. Yup, all 24 episodes. If anyone wants to get involved, feel free to get in touch on the Discord.

---

I plan to upload within 1-2 hours of the episode being released on official streaming sites, so I hope you can rely on me!

[Discord Server](https://discord.gg/jbVBTmUYbw) is available for any questions or if you need to contact me.

### Changes:
- Added OP/ED subs
-- Karaoke for OP, and new OP/ED styling. Let me know what you think of them!
-- (will be added to all eps on batch)
- Restyled typesetting
- Restyled dialogue
- Fixed timing in some instances
- Renamed personas to manga's TL
-- "Imp-chan" -> "Cheeky-chan"
-- "Baby-chan" -> "Bubbly-chan"

### Credits:
- washed: ED TL

### Mediainfo
- AVC Video
- Japanese Audio (AAC-LC)
- English Subs (ASS)

title: Yoake no Subete 2024 720p AMZN WEB-DL H.265
description:
![alt text](https://i.imgur.com/bPlPYV3.jpeg)

**Summary :** Fujisawa Misa experiences premenstrual syndrome once a month. During those times, she tries to deal with her uncontrolled irritation at understanding her colleagues at work. One day, when she experiences PMS, her anger explodes at Yamazoe Takatoshi, who has recently begun working at the same company. It was just a small action that triggered her anger. She feels self-hatred because of this. Meanwhile, Yamazoe Takatoshi suffers from panic disorder. Due to that, he gave up on many things in his life and he carries a lethargic attitude to his life. Becoming aware of each other’s situation, Yamazoe Takatoshi and Fujisawa Misa begin to share a bond and try to help each other.

**Native Title :** 夜明けのすべて
**Also Known As :** Everything at Dawn , All About Dawn , Yoake no Subete , よあけのすべて

**Maou Gun Saikyou no Majutsushi wa Ningen Datta | 魔王軍最強の魔術師は人間だった | The Strongest Magician in the Demon Lord's Army was a Human | Сильнейшим магом армии демонов был человек | Сильнeйший мaг aрмии Кoрoля Дeмoнoв oкaзaлся чeлoвeкoм [ТВ-1]** 

***

**Год выхода:** 2024
**Жанр:** приключения, фэнтези
**Тип:** TV
**Продолжительность:** 12 эп. по ~ 00:25:00
**Количество серий:** 10 из 12
**Дата выпуска:** c 26.06.2024
**Производство:** Япония, студия [Studio A-CAT](http://www.world-art.ru/company.php?id=18000)
**Снято по ранобэ:** [Самый сильный волшебник армии повелителя демонов оказался человеком](http://www.world-art.ru/animation/manga.php?id=6160)
**Автор оригинала:** [Хата Рёсукэ](http://www.world-art.ru/people.php?id=852895)
**Режиссер:** [Нагахама Норихико](http://www.world-art.ru/people.php?id=14473)

**Перевод  #1:** Профессиональный (закадровый) | [Dream Cast](https://vk.com/jamfans/)
**Перевод  #2:** Профессиональный (закадровый) | [AniLibria.TV](https://anilibria.tv/)
**Субтитры:** Русские надписи, русские (софтсаб) | Multi-10

**Описание:**
Сильнейший маг армии Короля Демонов — так называют Айка, способного в одиночку захватить замок. Уничтожая противников с помощью могущественной магии, он, без сомнения, самый настоящий монстр, вызывающий уважение у друзей и вселяющий ужас во врагов. Однако у сильнейшего мага есть секрет, который он не может рассказать другим демонам: на самом деле он человек.

title: Qin.Empire.Alliance.1080p.S01-S04.NetflixOriginals.Reripped.Cleaned.Denoise.ColorBalance.engliish.Subs.HEVC.(EFC)
description:
![qinemp](https://i.ibb.co/W2q8mxP/5j-BGBY3m-IG2d-EHI7-HHj-WLyb-Pav2.jpg)

**Description [TMDB](https://www.themoviedb.org/tv/32231-the-qin-empire)**

>The Qin Empire Alliance is a 2009 Chinese television series based on Sun Haohui's novel of the same Chinese title, which romanticises the rise of the Qin state in the Warring States period under the leadership of Duke Xiao of Qin. It was produced in 2006 and first aired on television channels in China in December 2009. It was followed by three sequels: The Qin Empire II: Alliance (2012), The Qin Empire III (2017) and The Qin Empire IV (2019), which were also based on Sun Haohui's novels.In 230 BC, King Ying Zheng of Qin began the sequence of campaigns that would bring the Warring States period to a close, setting out to conquer each remaining sovereign one by one. This was completed in 221 BC with the fall of Qi, leaving the former Zhou sphere unified under a more centralized Qin control. Ying Zheng declared himself the First Emperor, or Qin Shi Huang—becoming the first sovereign over a unified China under the imperial Qin dynasty.

**Mediainfo** 
Video | Subs | Encoder | Bitrate 
--- | --- | ---|---
IPT| NF| Paradise_Zero | 4 MBps


**Some Info From the encoder**
```
Technically speaking this original netflix archive was 334 GB.  Ridiculous.  I EFCed the series and then reripped it at an approriate quality and with HEVC shrunk it to 173GB.  Still very large but for 150 hours of video thats more reasonable and the video is now PRISTINE.  The NVIDIA Maxine Engine cleaned up the video quite nicely as well.  We cleaned up the Subs in a few spots also although netflix did quite a nice job.

This archive is quite amazing selection of entertainment and should be on any warring states period reproduction fans.  Just so you know the action battle scenes are very well done and dont seem fake at all which can happen when filming such HUGE complex scenes.
```


***WHAT ARE EFC ARCHIVES?***
>Edited For Content archives are all MKV format and have removed all intro and exit music (except Episode 001 of each season is left unedited for fans of that music).
>
>Also removed are food adverts, drink adverts, little figurines of anime characters adverts, Station Identification, Production House Logos, future episode previews and previous episode recaps.  All this digital EXCESS is REMOVED so the ACTUAL STORY can come through WITHOUT all the background noise and fast forwarding interruptions.
>
>EFC archives are structured such that you can watch hours and hours of uninterrupted anime or donghua.  EFC always focuses on bringing the story to the front and leave all the waste out.

**Please [SEED](https://media.tenor.com/3A5W_Dw_Xz0AAAAi/please-seed-until-the-earth-explosion.gif) to keep the files alive**

**Описание:**
Классик японской литературы Осаму Дадзай должен был умереть после самоубийства в 1948 году. Но в последнюю минуту ему помешал Грузовик-кун, удар которого зашвырнул писателя в фэнтезийный мир, где, как водится, полно невероятных приключений, крутых способностей и милых фэнтезийных девочек. Вот только ему всего этого не надо. Меланхоличный литератор всё так же лелеет свою поэтическую мечту найти идеальное место для смерти. Но как бы он ни рисковал и в какие бы опасности ни влезал, всё всегда оборачивается в его пользу, к его полнейшему разочарованию.

**Описание:**
Масаки — бывшая участница популярной группы ньютуберов Harikiri Sisters. Всё у неё было прекрасно, пока её не уволили прямо в ходе стрима. Однако всё меняется, когда Масаки встречает Лайв — вампиршу со сверхспособностями, которая становится её напарницей. Вместе они собираются пилить крутейший контент и заполучить миллион подписчиков... Правда, у вампирши тут есть свой гастрономический интерес.

title: Customs Frontline 2024 720p WEB-DL AAC H265 2Audio
description:
![alt text](https://i.imgur.com/3nBThEo.jpeg)

**Summary :** When a container ship mysteriously turns up in Hong Kong waters, local Customs officers sail into dangerous international drama. After boarding the vessel, a team led by Cheung Wan Nam and including young hotshot Chow Ching Lai discover dead bodies of crew members and a huge cache of arms, including a valuable compass suited for use in a submarine. The haul of weaponry, thought to have been swiped from Thailand, is carted off to a government ordnance depot for safekeeping. When Thai Interpol officers arrive for an inspection, the arms smugglers rush in. The raid results in casualties and shellshocked officers, causing a rapid escalation in response. Customs’ ports and intelligence branches, headed by Kwok Chi Keung and Athena Siu respectively, must work together and go international in catching the perpetrators. Appearing to be linked to a growing conflict in Africa, Chow and Thai agent Ying jet off to Loklamoa for to get a handle on how arms dealer Dr Raw is involved. The pair sense there’s a rat in Customs while back in Hong Kong investigators pin down the local shipping firm that’s in on the deal. Once the full picture emerges of how the arms turned up and where they’re headed, high drama is in store in Hong Kong’s Victoria Harbour.

title: Close to Love 2022 720p WEB-DL H265
description:
![alt text](https://i.imgur.com/DNm6glh.jpeg)

**Summary :** Both Xu Yi and Gao Xiao Nan left their small town with misunderstandings and unanswered questions for each other. They reunite later in college. As a result, they made up with each other and resulted in a bond that spanned multiple years. Xu Yi and Gao Xiao Nan unraveled their old knots in their friendship, from friends to best friends, from young students to rookies in the working industry. They accompany each other and grow together. They are not lovers, they’re actually far from being lovers. However, the boundaries that they’ve made of not touching each other breaks due to an accident. Will the friendship between Xu Yi and Gao Xiao Nan change? Will they part away or stay together?

title: Chime 2024 720p x265
description:
![alt text](https://i.imgur.com/f648ygK.jpeg)

**Summary :** Matsuoka is a teacher at a culinary school. One day, a student, Tashiro, says something strange during the lesson: “There’s a noise, it’s like a chime. Someone is sending me a message.” The people running the school warn him that Tashiro’s a little odd, but Matsuoka isn’t bothered by it at all and continues treating him normally. However, on another day, Tashiro says, “Half of my brain has been replaced with a machine,” and takes drastic action to prove it. Some days after the incident with Tashiro, Matsuoka is teaching a female student, Akemi. Matsuoka continues teaching enthusiastically, but when she complains that a whole chicken leaves her feeling uncomfortable, something incomprehensible overtakes him. Both at school and at home, a strange dread begins to undulate in his ordinary existence…
